evidence.issue: unparseable shade code "Oil Reflections Luminous Shampoo"

proposedChanges.name: No Wella rule change accepted
proposedChanges.note: Provisional Wella changes were reverted. Exact rule proof must be implemented test-first before any change is accepted.

ruleJustifications.name: Provisional Wella product-type routing and non-shade separation (reverted)
ruleJustifications.pattern: Repeat Wella product lines such as BLONDOR DEVELOPERS, ULTIMATE REPAIR, BRILLIANCE, FUSION, WELLOXON DEVELOPERS are non-shade products but were penalized as shade parse failures.
ruleJustifications.whyCurrentWrong: Not accepted yet. The baseline proves 73 of 385 review records are non-shade products, but the exact rule change must be tested independently before acceptance.
ruleJustifications.whyManufacturerCorrect: Likely correct for Wella developer/lightener/care lines, but not accepted without exact regression comparison.
ruleJustifications.recordsCouldRegress: Unknown until exact test-first comparison is implemented.

ruleJustifications.name: Provisional Wella Color Charm alpha suffix parsing (reverted)
ruleJustifications.pattern: Color Charm alpha shade codes like 10A, 8N, 8G, 7RR, 2BBL.
ruleJustifications.whyCurrentWrong: Not accepted yet. The baseline shows recurring alpha-like Color Charm records, but each needs manufacturer-correct evidence and tests before parser changes.
ruleJustifications.whyManufacturerCorrect: Potentially Wella-scoped, but not accepted in code.
ruleJustifications.recordsCouldRegress: Unknown until exact test-first comparison is implemented.

ruleJustifications.name: Provisional Wella product line aliases (reverted)
ruleJustifications.pattern: KOLESTONE, COLOR TOUCH PLUS, ILLUMINA, COLOR FRESH, TRUE GREY, INSTAMATIC and Color Charm line names recur as known Wella lines.
ruleJustifications.whyCurrentWrong: Not accepted yet. The baseline breakdown suggests routing gaps, but aliases must be proven line-by-line.
ruleJustifications.whyManufacturerCorrect: Potentially Wella-scoped, but not accepted in code.
ruleJustifications.recordsCouldRegress: Unknown until exact test-first comparison is implemented.

rulesReverted: Provisional Wella Color Charm alpha parsing
Provisional non-shade product variant exclusion from shade ontology
decision: The real Wella baseline has been restored and frozen at 406 automatic / 385 review / 0 unresolved. No Wella shade-rule change is accepted in this report. The next safe step is manual review of the baseline review-by-type breakdown and then isolated, test-first proof for any Wella-only rule change.
